# FM module HealthSwatch primitive: the five-category legend unit

## Context

B-split of #14593 (horizon map v2, group B): the health swatch as its own one-PR leaf — the category-color unit the health bar (#14599) and the legend both compose.

## The Fix

The per-view triplet inside the agentos FM module: (1) HealthSwatch — a `--fm-state-*`-keyed dot+label unit for the five categories (ok/idle/wedged/limited/off), label styling per the SSOT legend row; (2) unit specs — category→token mapping, unknown-category degrade (renders `off`-toned with the literal category text — never invisible), label casing; (3) NL-verifiable legend row.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Five categories render from state tokens; unknown category degrades visibly.
- [ ] Composable as both legend row and count-carrying bar unit (#14599's consumer shape — a count slot).
- [ ] Tokens only; unit specs (custom playwright config) + NL-verified row.

## Out of Scope

StateDot (#14593, narrowed) · FamilyRail (sibling) · the health BAR layout + animated counts (#14599).

## Related

Epic #14560 (parent) · split-of #14593 · consumes merged tokens · CARD-CONTRACT (PR #14627) · #14592 (category-swing evidence).

Sweeps: current window; no equivalent; A2A clean. Structure-map: N/A.
